name: Outbound
description: Turn a single LinkedIn post into a paused cold email campaign in Instantly. Scrape commenters or reactors with Apify, store them in Airtable, find verified emails through Apollo, co-write a 3-email sequence, then load everything into Instantly. The campaign always stays paused for your review - never auto-launched.

skills.name: LinkedIn Comment to Outreach
skills.description: Turn a single LinkedIn post URL into a paused cold email campaign in Instantly. Scrapes every commenter, enriches with Apollo, co-writes a 3-email sequence, loads into Instantly. Always paused for review.
examples: Run the LinkedIn pipeline on this post: https://linkedin.com/posts/...

skills.name: LinkedIn Reaction to Outreach
skills.description: Same end-to-end pipeline as the comment version but for people who reacted to a LinkedIn post. 5-10x more leads with full LinkedIn profiles attached including experience, education, skills, and certifications.
examples: Scrape and email everyone who reacted to this post

skills.name: LinkedIn Comment Scraper
skills.description: Scrape every commenter on a LinkedIn post via Apify. Pulls names, headlines, profile URLs, comment text, and reaction counts. Deduped by profile URL.
examples: Scrape commenters from this LinkedIn post: https://linkedin.com/posts/...

skills.name: LinkedIn Reaction Scraper
skills.description: Scrape every reactor on a LinkedIn post via Apify with full LinkedIn profiles: experience history, education, skills, certifications, location, connections count.
examples: Pull a list of who reacted to this post with their full profiles

skills.name: Airtable Lead Loader
skills.description: Create a new Airtable table with full lead-tracking schema and batch-load records using 4 parallel agents for 4x faster loading. Works around Airtable one-record-per-call limit.
examples: Create a new Airtable table for this list

skills.name: Apollo Enrichment
skills.description: Find verified emails for a list of leads via Apollo bulk match in batches of 10. Updates Airtable rows with email, company, title, location and creates Apollo contacts under named labels.

skills.name: Cold Email Sequence
skills.description: Co-write a 3-email cold outreach sequence using the James Shields framework: trigger-based subject, 3-sentence body, irresistible no-strings offer, one-word reply CTA. Each email locked with user before moving to next.
examples: Write me a cold email sequence for these contacts

skills.name: Instantly Campaign
skills.description: Create a paused cold email campaign in Instantly with all leads loaded and all sending accounts attached. Sanitizes bodies for Instantly ampersand bug. Always paused for review - never auto-launched.
examples: Create the Instantly campaign for this list
